calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-06-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Thomas C. Tagliarini for petitioners Reese Anthony Healey and Deborah J. Healy (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Amended Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary.

The Court inquired whether there were any objections. Counsel responded there were none.

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters. The will dated May 31, 2017 was admitted to probate.

Reese Anthony Healey and Deborah J. Healy were appointed as Co-Executors, with full IAEA authority. Bond was set at $20,000.

Michael Kasolas was appointed probate referee. The Court disclosed that the assigned probate referee is married to a legal advisory staff member of this court.

The Court set a status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration for July 6, 2027, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed at least two weeks prior to the status date, no appearance is required.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
